commands.review_summary:
The PR moves provider-status fetching and JSON decoding off the main actor, replaces per-date ISO8601 formatter allocation with shared lock-guarded formatters, and adds an off-main regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. for the underlying isolation path: current main visibly performs status-feed parsing through main-actor-isolated UsageStore helpers, and the linked issue identifies that exact stack in Instruments. The precise latency varies with the live payload and was not independently rerun during this read-only review.
